meta.title: Thabet Amer - Technical Product Leader | Cloud & Engineering
meta.description: Technical leader with 15+ years building scalable systems — cloud architecture, DevOps, and product management for global startups and enterprise clients.

hero.name: Thabet Amer
hero.bio: Building scalable systems and leading product teams across 15+ countries. I bridge the gap between technical excellence and business outcomes, specializing in cloud-native solutions and AI-driven platforms.

items.title: Product Leadership
items.description: Driving product strategy from discovery to delivery, aligning cross-functional teams around user outcomes and business value.

items.title: Cloud & DevOps
items.description: Architecting resilient cloud infrastructure and implementing CI/CD pipelines that enable teams to ship with confidence.

items.title: AI-Driven Systems
items.description: Designing intelligent systems that leverage machine learning to automate workflows and surface actionable insights.
